zh.lifeSummary: Rebekah Lewellin是Littleberry Lewellin的女兒，於大約1744年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州。她於1760年與Bird Land在美國密西西比州結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1794年之前在美國維吉尼亞州素坦普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rebekah Lewellin是Littleberry Lewellin的女儿，于大约1744年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州。她于1760年与Bird Land在美国密西西比州结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1794年之前在美国弗吉尼亚州素坦普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Lewellin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 10th state
historicEvents.description: On June 25, 1788 Virginia became the 10th state.

en.lifeSummary: Rebekah Lewellin was born about 1744, in Virginia, British Colonial America as the daughter of Littleberry Lewellin. She married Bird Land in 1760, in Mississippi, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 1794, in Southampton, Virginia, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebekah Lewellinは約1744年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州でLittleberry Lewellinの娘として生まれた。1760年にアメリカ合衆国ミシシッピ州でBird Landと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1794年以前にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ソウサンプトンで死去した。

ko.Albemarle Parish, Surry, Colony of Virgi: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 수리 알브마일 파리시

ko.lifeSummary: Rebekah Lewellin(은)는 대략 1744년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 Littleberry Lewellin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1760년 미국 미시시피 주에서 Bird Land(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1794년 이전 미국 버지니아 주 소우섬프턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rebekah Lewellin nasceu aproximadamente 1744, em Virginia, British Colonial America filha de Littleberry Lewellin. Ela casou-se com Bird Land em 1760, em Mississípi, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1794, em Southampton, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Rebekah Lewellin родилась около 1744 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. Её отца звали Littleberry Lewellin. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bird Land в 1760 г. в местности Миссисипи, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1794 г. в местности соутамптон, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.
